problem.title: Largest Rectangle in Histogram
problem.description: Given an array of integers heights representing the histogram's bar height where the width of each bar is 1, return the area of the largest rectangle in the histogram.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Monotonic Stack
solutions.description: Maintain a monotonically increasing stack of bar indices. When a shorter bar is encountered, bars taller than it are popped and their maximum rectangle area is computed using the current index and the new stack top as left/right boundaries. This works because each popped bar is the shortest in the span between the new stack top and the current index.
